dapps.name: KeyUses

dapps.name: PocketWeb
dapps.description: Decentralised web browser for the Minima network with Linternet dapp installer and light/dark themes

dapps.description: Decentralised file system MiniDapp for storing and sharing files on Minima

dapps.name: Linternet Plaza
dapps.description: Dynamic catalogue of all sites on the PocketWeb / Linternet — browse the decentralised web

dapps.name: History
dapps.description: Reconstruct and search your node's full default-wallet transaction history from block.minima.global — survives re-syncs, updates live from your local node, with CSV/JSON export and a signature key-reuse check.

dapps.name: Maximize
dapps.description: Minima yield and staking rewards maximizer

dapps.name: Powers of 2
dapps.description: Addictive number puzzle game — slide tiles to reach 2048

dapps.name: Calculator
dapps.description: Simple calculator for everyday arithmetic

dapps.name: BIP39 Seed Generator
dapps.description: Generate BIP39 mnemonic seed phrases - deterministic or random

dapps.name: Brain Wallet
dapps.description: Generate BTC and LTC addresses from a passphrase via scrypt

dapps.name: Breaklock
dapps.description: Pattern lock puzzle game — crack the code to win

dapps.name: Alien Invasion
dapps.description: Retro space shooter — defend Earth from alien invaders

dapps.name: Seed Gen
dapps.description: Securely generate a new 24-word mnemonic seed phrase

dapps.name: Zero Edge Casino
dapps.description: Provably fair on-chain casino — 3-phase commit-reveal with coin flip, dice, and roulette. PS1-era cyber aesthetic.

dapps.name: Limit
dapps.description: On-chain limit order DEX for MINIMA/USDT — trustless fills via VERIFYOUT smart contract. Good-till-cancelled orders auto-renew so they never expire, and you can edit an order's price.

dapps.name: minArmyKnife
dapps.description: Node hygiene toolkit — tracking audit, stuck txns, coin manager, token dust, balance health

dapps.name: Asteroids
dapps.description: Classic Asteroids arcade game — shoot asteroids, dodge UFOs, survive waves. Touch and keyboard controls with persistent high scores.

dapps.name: Lunar Lander
dapps.description: Classic 1979 Atari Lunar Lander — thrust, rotate, land on pads. Manage fuel and angle for bonus points. Persistent high scores.

dapps.name: staticMLS

dapps.name: Wallet 2.47.2
dapps.description: Legacy 2.47.2 release of the official Minima Wallet — exchange tokens with Minimalists

dapps.name: AnyPhraseRecovery
dapps.description: Sweep funds out of a webwallet seed without giving up control of this Minima node — snapshot, borrow the seed via megammrsync, sweep, restore. Also lets you become a MegaMMR host for other recovery users.

dapps.name: utxoWallet
dapps.description: Explicit UTXO-selection wallet for Minima — pick exactly which coins you spend. Send, Split, Distribute, Consolidate and QR receive, with full coin and token detail. Light + dark themes.
